title: 岳麓山下
synopsis: 民国三年（1914年），长沙岳麓山下。湘福轮船公司老板易温离奇死亡，六名嫌疑人各有动机。在这座隐藏着家族秘密的麓下馆里，一场精心策划的谋杀正在上演——而真凶，就藏在幸存者之中。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Chinese mansion near Yuelu Mountain, traditional architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, mysterious atmosphere

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Chinese mansion murder mystery. Traditional architecture near Yuelu Mountain, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, six silhouettes in period costumes, mysterious atmosphere
